The '''''Galactic''-class battle carrier''' was a [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] in use by the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet|Galactic Alliance Navy]] by [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]],<ref name="B" /> designed some point after the end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].<ref name="TCSWE" />

==Characteristics==
It resembled the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]], to which it had been designed as a successor, roughly the same length and with a similar command tower and bridge atop the hull, but it was broader and blunter in shape, and one and a half times the tonnage of the older ships. There appeared to be several hangars on the ''Galactic''-class, with the forward-port-flange starfighter hangar housing four and a half squadrons and being the size of a sports arena.<ref name="B" />

Although it was considered a new, large [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]], the designation "battle [[Carrier/Legends|carrier]]" was chosen to avoid reminding people of the old [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] terror symbols. Moreover, the first ship of the class was called the [[Dodonna (Galactic-class)|''Dodonna'']], after [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] hero [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]].<ref name="B" />

==History==
The ''Galactic''-class was said to be in a different size-class than the [[Strident-class Star Defender|''Strident''-class Star Defenders]] of the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] fleet, one of the vessels it faced during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="B" />

==Behind the scenes==
On its introduction in ''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'', the ''Galactic''-class battle carrier is described as "just as long" as an ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer, suggesting a length of around 1,600 meters, although its widened hull makes it a significantly larger warship.

''Dodonna'' is also indicated as being in a larger "size class" than the ''Strident''-class Star Defender, which has caused some confusion, as some fans believe that the ''Strident''-class vessels should be a rather larger ships than the scale indicated for the battle carrier. However, this assumption is based on a complex inference from [[canon]], and need not be correct, whereas the size of ''Dodonna'' directly constrains the size of the Star Defender. As some fans have pointed out, the key line of dialogue stating that the Corellian fleet has "nothing in the size class of ''Dodonna''" could be read as indicating that the ''Strident''-class ships are actually larger than the battle carrier. This goes against the sense of the scene, but it could serve as the basis for a [[Retroactive continuity|retcon]]. It is also possible that ''Galactic''-class vessels could be the same length as ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers, but also substantially wider or taller. This would allow the ''Strident''-class vessels to be longer than an ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer yet still smaller than the ''Dodonna''.
